title: fikon's MRE
description: fikon's MRE is a mod that adds Military MREs to your game!
body:
fikon's MRE adds 2 types of MRE to your game!
- Small MRE
- Big MRE

Small MRE is crafted with 2x Steak + 1 Water bottle
Big MRE is crafted with 2x Steak + 2x Baked Potato + 1 Water bottle

THE BIG MRE IS BETTER THAN ALL VANILLA FOODS


This mod was mainly created for me and my friends but sharing is caring! Right?


Got any suggestions or bug reports? Contact me here:
Discord: fikon1
Mail: ffeelliixx479@gmail.com
